{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/privacy-federation/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. privacy-federation

_Файлов:_ 5

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-anonymization.md|00-question-anonymization.md] — 
* [01-what-to-anonymize-german-standard.md|01-what-to-anonymize-german-standard.md] — 
* [02-two-tier-publication.md|02-two-tier-publication.md] — 
* [03-what-this-gives-technically.md|03-what-this-gives-technically.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [04-what-i-can-do-now.md|04-what-i-can-do-now.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/multi-tier-architecture/README.md] (сходство 0.29)
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/voiceless-contributors/README.md] (сходство 0.25)
* [README|docs/nautilus/supply-demand/README.md] (сходство 0.23)
